gaps.snippet: # [doc = " One **continuation frame** of the L1 work-stack CEK machine (RFC-0041 §4.1/§4.6): the reified"] # [doc = " *post-child* work for one partially-evaluated construct. Each variant names what to do once the"] # [doc = " child it descended into settles — the interleaved scope push/pop, `release_if_abandoned`,"] # [doc = " return-guarantee assert, swap/ascription checks, and (for `App`) the source-call depth"] # [doc = " reservation ([`DepthGuard`]) that a former recursive stack frame carried implicitly."] # [allow (clippy :: large_enum_variant)] enum Frame < 'e , 'b > { # [doc = " A list literal: `elems[idx]` just evaluated → collect its repr, evaluate the next, or build"] # [doc = " the `Seq`."] ListElem { elems : & 'e [Expr] , idx : usize , vals : Vec < Value > , } , # [doc = " A `let`: the bound value just evaluated → assert its optional guarantee index, push the"] # [doc = " binding, evaluate the body."] LetBound { name : & 'e str , ty_guar : Option < Strength > , body : & 'e Expr , } , # [doc = " A `let` body just evaluated → pop the binding + `release_if_abandoned` (M-904 scope-exit)."] LetPop , # [doc = " An `if` condition just evaluated → choose the consequent/alternate branch (transparent: no"] # [doc = " value transform, so the chosen branch stays TCO-eligible)."] IfBranch { conseq : & 'e Expr , alt : & 'e Expr } , # [doc = " A `match` scrutinee just evaluated → try the arms' patterns."] MatchArms { arms : & 'e [crate :: ast :: Arm] } , # [doc = " A `match` arm body just evaluated → truncate the scope back to `mark` (drop the arm binders)."] MatchPop { mark : usize } , # [doc = " A `swap` source just evaluated → run the certified swap + optional guarantee assert."] SwapPost { target : & 'e crate :: ast :: TypeRef , policy : & 'e crate :: ast :: Path , } , # [doc = " A `consume` operand just evaluated → the checked affine Live→Consumed move."] ConsumePost , # [doc = " A `wrapping { … }` body just evaluated → lower the wrapping-region counter (`wrapping_depth`)"] # [doc = " and pass the body's value/error through unchanged (RFC-0034 §10.1; CU-5). The counter is"] # [doc = " lowered on **both** the value and the error path so an unwind never leaves the region latched."] WrappingPop , # [doc = " An ascription's inner value just evaluated → assert the guarantee index."] AscribePost { guar : Strength } , # [doc = " `fuse`'s left operand just evaluated → evaluate the right (carrying the left value + exprs)."] FuseAfterLeft { left_expr : & 'e Expr , right_expr : & 'e Expr , } , # [doc = " `fuse`'s right operand just evaluated → combine (repr prim) or begin the data `join` dispatch."] FuseAfterRight { lv : L1Value , left_expr : & 'e Expr , right_expr : & 'e Expr , } , # [doc = " The data-`fuse` `join` call: its (re-evaluated) left operand just evaluated → evaluate right."] FuseJoinLeft { right_expr : & 'e Expr , guard : DepthGuard < 'b > , } , # [doc = " The data-`fuse` `join` call: its right operand just evaluated → dispatch `join(left, right)`."] FuseJoinRight { lv2 : L1Value , guard : DepthGuard < 'b > } , # [doc = " A `reclaim` policy just evaluated (discarded) → evaluate the supervised body."] ReclaimBody { body : & 'e Expr } , # [doc = " A `colony` hypha's `@forage` policy just evaluated → record the placement decision, then the"] # [doc = " hypha's body."] ColonyForage { hyphae : & 'e [Hypha] , idx : usize } , # [doc = " A `colony` hypha's body just evaluated → the last hypha's value is the result; a leading"] # [doc = " hypha's value is discarded and the next hypha begins."] ColonyBody { hyphae : & 'e [Hypha] , idx : usize } , # [doc = " A `wild` host-op argument just evaluated → collect it, evaluate the next, or dispatch the op."] WildArgs { key : String , args : & 'e [Expr] , idx : usize , argv : Vec < L1Value > , } , # [doc = " An application argument just evaluated → collect it, evaluate the next, or dispatch the call."] # [doc = " Holds the App's source-call [`DepthGuard`] (charged at the App boundary, §4.0), moved into the"] # [doc = " callee's [`Self::InvokePost`] for a user call or dropped once a ctor/prim result is built."] AppArgs { name : & 'e str , args : & 'e [Expr] , idx : usize , argv : Vec < L1Value > , guard : DepthGuard < 'b > , } , # [doc = " A function body just evaluated → release the call's parameter scope (M-904), assert the"] # [doc = " return-guarantee index, and restore the caller's `site`/`base`. `tco_eligible` records whether"] # [doc = " *this* frame may be elided when its function makes a direct tail call (no pending post-work);"] # [doc = " `guard` is the call's depth reservation, released when this frame is dropped."] InvokePost { param_base : usize , saved_site : & 'e str , saved_base : usize , ret_guar : Option < Strength > , nparams : usize , tco_eligible : bool , # [allow (dead_code)] guard : DepthGuard < 'b > , } , # [doc = " A `for`'s spine (`xs`) just evaluated → evaluate the initial accumulator (`init`)."] ForAfterXs { x : & 'e str , acc : & 'e str , init : & 'e Expr , body : & 'e Expr , } , # [doc = " A `for`'s initial accumulator just evaluated → begin the iterative spine walk."] ForAfterInit { x : & 'e str , acc : & 'e str , body : & 'e Expr , spine : L1Value , } , # [doc = " A `for` body just evaluated (the next accumulator) → pop the element binders, advance the"] # [doc = " spine to `spine` (the tail), and either finish or evaluate the body for the next element."] ForStep { x : & 'e str , acc : & 'e str , body : & 'e Expr , spine : L1Value , } , }
